testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
11:29:11.986 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.smartteamworkspace.main.SmartTeamWorkspaceApplicationTests]: SmartTeamWorkspaceApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 11:29:12.208 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.smartteamworkspace.main.SmartTeamWorkspaceApplication for test class com.smartteamworkspace.main.SmartTeamWorkspaceApplicationTests 11:29:12.567 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running

connection org.postgresql.jdbc.PgConnection@4e3ee457 2026-03-05T11:29:17.561+05:30 INFO 24000 --- [SmartTeamWorkspace] [ main] com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource : HikariPool-1 - Start completed. 2026-03-05T11:29:17.635+05:30 WARN 24000 --- [SmartTeamWorkspace] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.deprecation : HHH90000025: PostgreSQLDialect does not need to be specified explicitly using 'hibernate.dialect' (remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) 2026-03-05T11:29:17.701+05:30 INFO 24000 --- [SmartTeamWorkspace] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.connections.pooling : HHH10001005: Database info: Database JDBC URL [jdbc:postgresql://localhost:5432/WorkNest] Database driver: PostgreSQL JDBC Driver Database dialect: PostgreSQLDialect Database version: 18.1 Default catalog/schema: WorkNest/public Autocommit mode: undefined/unknown Isolation level: READ_COMMITTED [default READ_COMMITTED] JDBC fetch size: none Pool: DataSourceConnectionProvider Minimum pool size: undefined/unknown Maximum pool size: undefined/unknown 2026-03-05T11:29:20.011+05:30 INFO 24000 --- [SmartTeamWorkspace] [ main] org.hibernate.orm.core : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: create table app_user ( user_id bigint not null, account_status varchar(255) not null check ((account_status in ('ACTIVE','DISABLED','SUSPENDED'))), created_at timestamp(6) not null, email varchar(255) not null, password varchar(255) not null, role varchar(255) not null check ((role in ('ADMIN','MEMBER','VIEWER'))), user_name varchar(255) not null, primary key (user_id) ) Hibernate: create table comment ( id bigint not null, content varchar(255) not null, created_at timestamp(6), author_user_id bigint not null, task_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table project ( id bigint not null, created_at timestamp(6), deadline date, name varchar(255) not null, start_day date, status varchar(255) check ((status in ('ACTIVE','CANCELLED','COMPLETED'))), visibility varchar(255) check ((visibility in ('PUBLIC','TEAM_ONLY','PRIVATE'))), team_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table project_member ( id bigint not null, joined_at timestamp(6), role varchar(255) not null check ((role in ('PROJECT_MANAGER','CONTRIBUTOR'))), project_id bigint not null, user_user_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table task ( id bigint not null, created_at timestamp(6), description varchar(2000), due_date date, priority varchar(255) check ((priority in ('LOW','MEDIUM','HIGH'))), status varchar(255) check ((status in ('TODO','IN_PROGRESS','COMPLETED','DELAYED'))), title varchar(255) not null, assignee_user_id bigint not null, project_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table task_attachment ( id bigint not null, file_name varchar(255) not null, file_type varchar(255) not null, file_url varchar(255) not null, uploaded_at timestamp(6), task_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table team ( id bigint not null, created_at timestamp(6), name varchar(255) not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: create table team_member ( id bigint not null, designation varchar(255) not null, joined_at timestamp(6), role varchar(255) not null check ((role in ('TEAM_OWNER','TEAM_LEADER','TEAM_MEMBER'))), team_id bigint not null, user_user_id bigint not null, primary key (id) ) Hibernate: alter table if exists app_user drop constraint if exists testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\Asus\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.17.8\byte-buddy-agent-1.17.8.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release
